name: templatecentral
description: One prompt scaffolds a production-ready Next.js, Vite+React, FastAPI, or NestJS project — App Router, shadcn/ui, TanStack Query, Docker, Vitest, and AGENTS.md included. 10 skills covering scaffold, auth, database, testing, logging, and more.

plugins.name: templatecentral
plugins.description: 10 skills for scaffolding and extending Next.js, Vite+React, FastAPI, and NestJS projects. Covers scaffold, auth, database, API routes, components, forms, testing, logging, error handling, pagination, and full-stack pairing. Each scaffold produces a fully configured project with linting, formatting, testing, Docker, and AI agent docs.
